description_long: This vending machine is a tall, rectangular unit with a dark gray metallic exterior and a glass front panel displaying several rows of coiled dispensers for bottled or canned beverages. The front features a control panel on the right side, including a display screen, payment slots, and product selection buttons, all arranged vertically. The lower section of the front has a clearly marked retrieval slot labeled 'PUSH' for collecting purchased items. The sides and back are solid and unadorned, with the back panel exposing a series of copper coils, likely part of the refrigeration system, and ventilation grilles. The machine's overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for placement in public urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or building lobbies. The visible materials suggest a combination of metal, glass, and plastic, with a sturdy construction to withstand frequent use.
description: A tall, dark gray vending machine with a glass front displaying coiled dispensers, a control panel, and a 'PUSH' retrieval slot. The back features exposed copper coils and ventilation grilles.
description_view_0: The rear view shows exposed copper coils arranged in a serpentine pattern behind a protective grille, with several ventilation panels on the top and bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, solid dark gray metal surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The front view displays the glass panel with multiple rows of coiled dispensers, a vertical control panel on the right, and a 'PUSH' retrieval slot at the bottom.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, solid dark gray metal surface with a small access panel near the bottom.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located on the upper right section of the front, vertically oriented, with a digital screen and printed instructions visible.
attribute_payment_interface: The payment interface includes a coin slot, bill acceptor, and card reader, all vertically aligned on the right side of the front control panel.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual product selection buttons is present on the right side of the front panel, each corresponding to a product row.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, rectangular retrieval slot labeled 'PUSH' is located at the bottom center of the front, with a flap for accessing purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: The word 'PUSH' is prominently displayed in yellow on the retrieval slot at the bottom front; no other branding or logos are visible.
